name: SKELETON_PATHWAY__RANK_BY_FAMILY_COUNT__TARGET_PAIR__ALL_TIME
macro_frame_family_zh: 按家族量排序的靶点对排名
description: Independent frame skeleton for ranking target pairs by family count under a pathway constraint.
cypher_template:
MATCH (pw:Pathway {name: $pathway})<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)
MATCH (tp)<-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]-(p:Patent)<-[:HAS_PATENT]-(fam:Family)
RETURN tp.name AS target_pair, count(DISTINCT fam) AS family_count
ORDER BY family_count DESC, target_pair
LIMIT 10
examples: Among target pairs related to the Signaling by Overexpressed Wild-Type EGFR in Cancer pathway, which ones have the most patent families? Please return the top 10.
Among target pairs related to the CD28 dependent PI3K/Akt signaling pathway, which ones have the most patent families? Please return the top 10.
Among target pairs related to the MET activates PTPN11 pathway, which ones have the most patent families? Please return the top 10.
